entry.title: New IDC FA489018D0002 awarded to URS FEDERAL SERVICES, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Any supplies and services to be furnished under this contract shall be ordered by issuance of delivery orders or task orders by the individuals or activities designated in the contract schedule. The ordering period is seven (7) years from the date of contract award.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MQ-1/MQ-9/RQ-4 REMOTELY PILOTED AIRCRAFT (RPA) O-LEVEL MAINTENANCE AND SUPPORT SERVICES

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorAlternateName: URS FEDERAL SERVICES, INC., AN AECOM COMPANY
